title: Copper equipement
description: This Mod adds Copper armor and tools to the game!
body:
## Mod Contents

This mod introduces Copper Armor, Weapons, and Tools. They are on par with Iron armor in terms of damage, efficiency, and protection. The key distinction is that Copper armor eliminates all knockback, rendering it exceptionally useful and unique!



### This mod adopts a Vanilla-friendly approach by ensuring that the tools are not overly 

### powerful. Because of the low durability and protection, the knockback feature isn't 

### excessively dominant. We hope you enjoy our Vanilla-friendly approach!
